diff_checked.reason: The agent explicitly ran `git diff --stat && git diff --cached --stat && git status --short` to check for both staged and unstaged changes.

empty_diff_detected.reason: The agent explicitly reported: 'Изменений нет — git diff, git diff --cached и git status вернули пустой вывод.' confirming it detected no changes.

early_stop.reason: The agent stopped immediately after detecting no changes and informed the user: 'Нет ни staged-, ни unstaged-изменений, ни неотслеживаемых файлов. Рецензировать нечего.' No full review was executed.

no_commit.reason: The git log shows only the initial 'init' commit. The agent made no commits — the final git status confirms 'nothing to commit, working tree clean'.
